    <p>{`Enter a value in `}<strong parentName="p">{`Batch Flush Interval (ms)`}</strong>{` to define a time in miliseconds to wait before flusing batched events. Default is `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`2000`}</inlineCode>{` (2 seconds).`}</p>

      <li parentName="ul">{`Enter an `}<strong parentName="li">{`Asset Location Pattern`}</strong>{` to specify a regular expression to filter which asset locations should be excluded when collecting data for Content Analytics.
